macro.title: Soaring jet fuel prices and shortages could threaten your European vacation - The Washington Post
macro.summary: Even if fuel shortages can be avoided, airfare prices overseas and in the United States are expected to continue to climb as the war in Iran disrupts supplies.

macro.title: Trump-branded AI data center megaproject stalls, CEO departs - Axios
macro.summary: Fermi America is emerging as a high-profile test of ambitious AI data center projects.

macro.title: Everyone Celebrated The GENIUS Act. Nobody Read The Compliance Section. - Forbes
macro.summary: The GENIUS Act makes stablecoin issuers financial institutions under the Bank Secrecy Act. The compliance costs will consolidate the market. Here is who survives and why.

macro.title: If We Net Export Oil, Why Are Gas Prices Going Up? - Jalopnik
macro.summary: Why are gas prices going up? Consider that 40% of U.S. refinery oil is imported and 20% of the world’s oil passes through the Strait of Hormuz.
